activities_projects.title: Reflection with a Plane Mirror
steps: Place a mirror vertically on a sheet of paper
Shine a torch light towards the mirror
Mark the incident and reflected rays
Measure the angles using a protractor
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands that angle of incidence equals angle of reflection

activities_projects.title: Mirror Image Observation
activities_projects.objective: Observe how images are formed in a plane mirror
steps: Place an object in front of a mirror
Observe its image
Note the size, position, and orientation of the image

activities_projects.title: Left–Right Reversal Test
steps: Stand in front of a mirror
Raise your right hand
Observe the mirror image
Record your observation

activities_projects.title: Concave Mirror Focusing Experiment
activities_projects.objective: Observe how concave mirrors focus light
steps: Hold the concave mirror facing sunlight
Place a white paper in front of the mirror
Move the paper until a bright spot appears
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands focusing property of concave mirrors

activities_projects.title: Convex Mirror Observation
activities_projects.objective: Understand image formation in convex mirrors
steps: Place an object in front of a convex mirror
Observe the image
Note whether it is upright or inverted
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises properties of convex mirror images

activities_projects.title: Magnifying Glass Experiment
activities_projects.objective: Understand the function of a convex lens
steps: Place the magnifying glass over printed text
Move it up and down
Observe how the text appears

activities_projects.title: Lens Image Distance Study
activities_projects.objective: Observe how distance affects image formation
steps: Place a candle in front of a convex lens
Move the screen behind the lens
Observe where the image becomes clear
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification of image position (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Reflection in Daily Life
activities_projects.objective: Identify uses of mirrors in everyday life
steps: List examples where mirrors are used
Explain the purpose of each mirror
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects mirror concepts to daily life

activities_projects.title: Periscope Model
activities_projects.objective: Understand how mirrors change the direction of light
steps: Fix two mirrors inside the box at 45° angles
Look through the bottom opening
Observe objects above your eye level

activities_projects.title: Image Size Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Compare images formed by different mirrors
steps: Place the object in front of each mirror
Observe and compare the images
Record differences in size and orientation
